meaning: n.仓库,货栈,大商店vt.贮入仓库,<俚>[经]以他人名义购进(股票)
examples: We have plenty more of them in the warehouse.
The warehouse has been badly damaged by fire.
Matters were made worse by a fire in the warehouse.
Start by playing detective and kick some tires at a supplier s plant or warehouse.
We were selling only the stock we already had locked up in the warehouse anyway.
